Footer.description: Professional breeding of high-quality geckos. Passion meets genetics to create healthy and beautiful animals.

Home.heroDesc: We specialize in the professional breeding of high-quality leopard geckos, focusing on excellent health, genetics, and unique morphs.
Home.aboutDesc: Our journey began with a pure passion for these amazing reptiles. Today, our mission is to breed healthy, strong, and beautiful animals. At Navis Gecko, animal welfare always comes first.
Home.aboutList1: Only healthy breeding animals, regularly checked by veterinarians.
Home.aboutList2: Optimal diet, supplementation, and naturally arranged spacious habitats.
Home.aboutList3: Meticulously tracked genetics and precise matching of morphs.
Home.aboutList4: Professional support for future owners of our geckos.
Home.breedersDesc: The foundation of every great breeding project lies in exceptional genes. Meet some of the key representatives of our breeding lines.
Home.noBreeders: Log in to the admin panel to add descriptions of your geckos.

Available.title: Available Animals
Available.description: Browse our current collection. If you are interested, click "Inquire" and proceed to the contact form.

Contact.pageDesc: Have questions about a specific gecko? Want to make a reservation or learn more about care? Write to us!
Contact.successDesc: Thank you for contacting us. We will reply to your email as soon as possible.
